scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @nodejs/server" "npm run dev -w @nodejs/client" "npm run dev -w @nodejs/admin"
scripts.dev:inventory: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,cyan "npm run dev -w @nodejs/server" "npm run dev -w @nodejs/inventory-web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nodejs/server && npm run build -w @nodejs/client && npm run build -w @nodejs/admin && npm run build -w @nodejs/inventory-web
